documentation.description: Maximum PDU size per Modbus specification

subtypes.name: PDU_Data_Length
subtypes.code: subtype PDU_Data_Length is Natural range 0 .. Max_PDU_Size;

subtypes.name: PDU_Index
subtypes.code: subtype PDU_Index is Natural range 0 .. Max_PDU_Size - 1;
